Publisher Font Sizes

Expected behavior with Publisher font sizes Off:

  • Normal body text should mostly follow the user-selected 3dslibris font size.
  • Publisher CSS font-size should not globally shrink/enlarge normal text.
  • These paragraphs should look much closer to the baseline.

Expected behavior with Publisher font sizes On:

  • The smaller/larger publisher CSS examples should visibly change size.

This is a baseline normal paragraph. It should follow the user setting in both modes.

INLINE 70% — should only look smaller when Publisher font sizes is ON.

INLINE 140% — should only look larger when Publisher font sizes is ON.

CLASS TINY (70%) — should only look smaller when Publisher font sizes is ON.

CLASS LARGE (140%) — should only look larger when Publisher font sizes is ON.

This is a normal paragraph with INLINE 70% SPAN and CLASS TINY SPAN mixed in. They should only be small when Publisher sizes are ON.
